description: Local MCP server exposed by the pay CLI for wallet-approved paid API calls.

tools.name: search_skills
tools.title: Search pay-skills providers
tools.description: Find payment-ready API providers for a user task.

tools.name: get_skill_endpoints
tools.title: Get provider endpoints
tools.description: Return ready-to-call endpoint URLs, pricing metadata, and usage notes for a provider.

tools.name: curl
tools.title: Paid HTTP request
tools.description: Make an HTTP request and handle 402 payment challenges with local wallet approval.

tools.name: get_balance
tools.title: Check Pay balance
tools.description: Check the local Pay wallet balance before a paid API call.
